headline: Inflation Is Hitting These Consumers Hard In Iran War
summary: Rising energy costs are hitting Americans hard, and the latest inflation data shows airline travelers are among the worst hit.  Airline fares rose 2.7% in March from the previous month, the latest Consumer Price Index showed.  Year over year, airfares have climbed 14.9%, among the largest price increases for consumer goods and services.

headline: Airfares Skyrocket as Carriers Tackle Rising Fuel Costs
summary: Airfares jumped in March as surging jet fuel prices quickly filtered through to consumers.  Airline fares skyrocketed 14.9% year over year in March, CPI data showed Friday.  Delta Air Lines, American Airlines, Southwest Airlines, and United Airlines have all increased their first checked bag fee by $10.
